# Gcore Colocation

> Overview of Gcore Colocation - place customer hardware in Tier II and above data centers across 29 global locations with DDoS protection and on-site support.

- [Colocation](https://gcore.com/docs/colocation/overview.md): Overview of Gcore Colocation - place customer hardware in Tier II and above data centers across 29 global locations with DDoS protection and on-site support.
- [Service requests](https://gcore.com/docs/colocation/service-requests.md): Submit Colocation service requests for data center access, parcel reception, equipment operations, dispatch, and LOA, with Standard and High priority options.
